title: Item Default Values is disabled
excerpt: I created a new board, but when I click on Board Settings, the “Item default values” is disabled and grayed out. Why would that be?

posts.author: jdenicola (JoeD)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a new board, but when I click on Board Settings, the “Item default values” is disabled and grayed out. Why would that be?

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jdenicola - The most likely issue is that you may not be a board owner. Even if you’re an admin, monday.com won’t let you change item terminology unless you’re an owner.
